scenario: burnout from chronic overwork with no boundaries

turns.user_message: Hey. So I've been struggling with work-life balance. Actually, there is no balance. It's all work and I'm falling apart.
I know, right? It sounds simple when I say it out loud but it doesn't feel simple.
The thing is, I had a really bad moment with no boundaries and couldn't even function the rest of the day.
I know rationally that lots of people deal with no boundaries and come out fine, but emotionally I just can't get there.
